1. v3-cold (no warmup) beats v1-warm (5% cache): 7.6ms vs 8.9ms p50
2. Cold path is where v3 dominates: 75% mis/q reduction, 51% p50 reduction
3. Hit rate jumps from 62% to 90.5% cold — BFS locality packs co-accessed VIDs into same page
5. v3-cold-S4D16 is best config: 7.1ms p50, 9.8ms p99, 142 QPS
6. Stopping + v3 synergy confirmed: S4D16 saves 8% blk/q on top of page packing
7. Simulation predicted 33% page/q reduction; actual mis/q reduction is 75% cold
because cache amplifies page reuse (one cached page serves multiple VIDs)
